examples: TOBLERONE, of Switzerland. Swiss milk chocolate with honey and almond nougat.
Another taste sensation featuring tastings of strawberry, ferrrao, hazelnut and nougat.
The wine shows its full complexity, with aromas of nougat, orange, white flowers and acacia honey.
Innovatively flavoured chocolates sit alongside the classics, all with evocative names: try the Friendship (almond praline), Amour (nougat centre) and Audacity (quince jelly).
It also makes machines that measure out the appropriate amounts of powder in pills, baking soda in diapers, whitener in toothpaste or nougat in candy bars.
